cells.value: Refer to IAS-3120 Disassembly and Assembly
cells.text: Refer to IAS-3120 Disassembly and Assembly

cells.value: Remove the 4 screws securing the top cover plate within the circle
cells.text: Remove the 4 screws securing the top cover plate within the circle

cells.value: Disconnect all ribbon cables and optical fibers connected to the top cover plate, remove the top cover plate, remove the 4 screws securing the motor, and replace the motor. Pay attention to the direction of the motor's connection port.
cells.text: Disconnect all ribbon cables and optical fibers connected to the top cover plate, remove the top cover plate, remove the 4 screws securing the motor, and replace the motor. Pay attention to the direction of the motor's connection port.

cells.value: Reassemble the device in reverse order
cells.text: Reassemble the device in reverse order
